name: EU Institutional Simulation
description: Multi-agent simulation of EU institutional processes: Commissioner personas, College deliberation, inter-service consultation, trilogue, and the full Ordinary Legislative Procedure.

skills.description: Invoke any of 21 Commissioner personas — speaks from treaty mandate, priorities, tensions
Full College of Commissioners meeting — all 21 speak, President calls vote, outcome recorded
ISC round — lead DG circulates, all affected DGs respond, synthesis note produced
Inter-institutional trilogue — EP/Council/Commission negotiate via four-column document
Full OLP from Commission initiative to OJ publication — chains all six phases
EP counter-party agent — committee, rapporteur, group dynamics, amendments, plenary vote
Council counter-party agent — configuration, QMV arithmetic, general approach, Presidency mandate
